creator: lippe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Submitter,

This port builds fine to me on 5.x/7.x(i386) and 7.x(amd64).

Can you update your ports tree and try to build again ?

http://tb4.droso.net/logs/7-lippe/mnogosearch-3.3.7.log
http://tb4.droso.net/logs/5-lippe/mnogosearch-3.3.7.log

If you no found any problems, permit us to close this PR ?

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
